# Blackheath Massage Therapy

> Mobile massage therapy serving Blackheath and the upper Blue Mountains, New South Wales, Australia. Qualified therapist Geoff Turner travels to the client (home, hotel, chalet or cottage) with the table, linens and oils. Bookings are by text or call to +61 435 903 945.

## Key facts

- Business: Blackheath Massage Therapy
- Therapist: Geoff Turner (qualified, experienced massage therapist)
- Service model: 100% mobile. The therapist comes to you; there is no fixed clinic to visit.
- Service area: within approximately 20 minutes' drive of Blackheath, upper Blue Mountains, NSW, Australia. This includes Blackheath, Medlow Bath, Katoomba, Leura, Mount Victoria and the Megalong Valley.
- Availability: by appointment, typically 8am-8pm, seven days. Text or call to check times.
- Booking: text or call +61 435 903 945. Instagram: @blackheathmassagetherapy
- Currency: AUD. Prices are for mobile service within the 20-minute service area.
- Timing note: quoted durations are hands-on treatment time. Allow an extra 15 minutes either side for set-up, a short consultation and pack-down.

## Treatments and prices

- The Signature Massage - 90 minutes - $195 AUD. Full-body massage curated with the client (hard or light, deep or knot) with extra focus where most needed.
- The Discovery Massage - 120 minutes - $240 AUD. Combines myofascial release, assisted stretching, foot reflexology and deep tissue.
- Relaxation Massage - 60 minutes - $150 AUD. Slow flowing strokes, light to heavy pressure, to ease tension and calm the nervous system.
- The Foot Rub - 60 minutes - $150 AUD. Reflexology for the feet and lower legs; client lies clothed on their back. Suited to runners, hikers and climbers.
- A Little Extra Foot Rub - 30 minutes - $45 AUD. A reflexology add-on for the Relaxation or Signature massage.

## How it works

1. Text or call to book a time and (optionally) describe what the body needs.
2. The therapist arrives with the table, fresh linens and oils, and sets up in a spot of the client's choosing.
3. The client receives the treatment and stays where they are afterwards - no travel home.

## Common questions

- Q: What areas do you cover? A: Mobile massage within ~20 minutes' drive of Blackheath — including Medlow Bath, Katoomba, Leura, Mount Victoria and the Megalong Valley, in the upper Blue Mountains, NSW.
- Q: Where does the massage take place? A: Wherever the client is — their own home, hotel, chalet or cottage. The service is fully mobile; there is no clinic. The therapist brings the table, fresh linens and oils.
- Q: How much does a mobile massage cost? A: Relaxation Massage (60 min) and The Foot Rub (60 min) are $150; The Signature Massage (90 min) is $195; The Discovery Massage (120 min) is $240; a 30-minute foot add-on is $45. All prices are AUD.
- Q: How long are treatments? A: 30 to 120 minutes of hands-on time. Allow an extra 15 minutes either side for set-up, a short consultation and pack-down.
- Q: How do I book? A: Text or call Geoff on +61 435 903 945. Mention where you are and what your body needs.
- Q: Is there a clinic to visit? A: No. The service is 100% mobile — the therapist travels to the client.

## Contact

- Phone / text: +61 435 903 945
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/blackheathmassagetherapy
- Website: https://djordje050182.github.io/blackheath-massage/
